confirmation_phrase_scope: STOP drill evidence only. Does not authorize runtime execution, scheduler registration, SOS send, queue write, broker action, live trading, or vacation mode.
safe_next_action: Anthony reviews the checklist, then either declines the STOP drill and remains blocked, or performs the STOP drill manually and records evidence. After real human evidence exists, create a separate confirmation packet.
stop_condition: Stop before claiming STOP drill pass, executing STOP through Codex, killing processes, launching runtime, executing runtime, mutating queues, sending SOS, registering scheduler, touching credentials, writing secrets, enabling live trading, or setting vacation_mode_complete true.
